revision.comment: Bot: mark 1 deleted QID(s) as DELETED_QID in ill templates [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24644718927|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:穂積咋]] {{Infobox person|gender={{ill|male|qid=Q6581097|1=Male (gender)}}|children={{ill|Hozumi no Ioe|qid=Q11597067|1=Hozumi no Ioe}}; {{ill|Hozumi no Momotari|qid=Q11597083|1=Hozumi no Momotari}}|father={{ill|Hozumi Soso|qid=Q11597084|1=Hozumi Soso}}}}
'''Hozumi Kui''' (穂積 咋) was a Japanese figure of the {{ill|Asuka period|en|Asuka period|qid=Q210688|lt=Asuka period|1=Asuka period}}, bearing the {{ill|Kabane|en|Kabane|qid=Q1664099|lt=kabane|1=Kabane}} title of {{ill|Omi (title)|en|Omi (title)|qid=Q2574718|lt=Omi|1=Omi (title)}}. In {{ill|Taika 1|ja|大化元年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taika 1|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579113|1=645}} (645), he was appointed as the first {{ill|Kokushi (official)|en|Kokushi (official)|qid=Q1351234|lt=Provincial Governor|1=Kokushi (official)}} of the Eastern Provinces. His {{ill|cap Rank|ja|冠位|1=Transition of Crown and Court Ranks|lt=Crown Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/cap Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Transition of Crown and Court Ranks|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 冠位・位階制度の変遷}} included {{ill|Koetsuga|ja|小乙下|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōotsuge|qq=}} and {{ill|Daisenjō|ja|大山上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daisenjō|qq=}}.
== Career == In Taika 1 (645), Hozumi Kui was dispatched as the first Provincial Governor of the Eastern Provinces. On the 19th day of the 9th month, Emperor Kōtoku issued an edict instructing provincial governors to govern with virtue. However, in Taika 2 (646), reports surfaced of misconduct during Kui's tenure, though he avoided severe punishment due to a general amnesty.
In Taika 5 (650), Kui was tasked by the Emperor to investigate suspicions of treason involving the {{ill|Minister of the Right|en|Minister of the Right|qid=Q1351174|lt=Minister of the Right|1=Minister of the Right}}, {{ill|Soga no Kurayamada no Ishikawa no Maro|en|Soga no Kurayamada no Ishikawa no Maro|qid=Q3488899|lt=Soga no Kurayamada Ishikawa Maro|1=Soga no Kurayamada no Ishikawa no Maro}}. Subsequently, Kui joined forces with {{ill|Soga no Hinokuma|ja|蘇我日向|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Soga no Hinokuma|qq=}} to lead a military expedition against Ishikawa Maro. The forces surrounded Maro's refuge at {{ill|Yamada-dera|en|Yamada-dera|qid=Q3571406|lt=Yamada-dera|1=Yamada-dera}}, where Maro had already taken his own life along with his family. Kui commanded {{ill|Mononobe no Fututa no Shio|ja|物部二田塩|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mononobe no Fututa no Shio|qq=}} to decapitate Maro's corpse.
== Notes == {{Reflist}}
== References == - {{ill|Hozumi-Suzuki Clan Genealogy|ja|穂積姓鈴木氏 - 紀州德川二七〇年鈴木家系譜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hozumi-Suzuki Clan Genealogy|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135579116}}, Junzuke Suzuki, 1982. - {{ill|Comprehensive Genealogy of Ancient Clans|ja|古代氏族系譜集成|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Comprehensive Genealogy of Ancient Clans|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Takaraga Toshio.
{{translated page|ja|穂積咋|version=88697604|comment=Imported full ja history}}
[[ja:穂積咋]]
<!--standardizing to enwiki standards where this would merely be the intersection of two categories--> <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> {{wikidata link|Q22129343}} [[Category:Hozumi Clan]] [[Category:People of Asuka-period Japan]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:Year of birth unknown]] [[Category:Year of death unknown]] [[Category:Year_of_birth_unknown]] [[Category:Year_of_death_unknown]] [[Category:Pages with deleted QID in ill template]]
